title: GLM-5.2 (Fully Tested): I got EARLY ACCESS & This MODEL is CRAZY!
summary: GLM-5.2 is an improved coding-focused language model from Z AI with a 1 million token context window, expected open-weights release, and strong performance on coding benchmarks. It is positioned as an affordable alternative to Claude and Codex through the GLM Coding Plan subscription at approximately $8 per month.
writeup: This video reviews GLM-5.2, a coding-focused language model from Z AI, after early access testing. The model carries a 1 million token context window, an expected open-weights release, and strong results on coding benchmarks. It is framed as an affordable alternative to Claude and Codex, available through the GLM Coding Plan subscription at roughly $8 per month.
